name: HQ
notes: Pre-seeded only, never freshly built (isFixed). Never ruins: at 0 HP, ownership of the whole base flips to the attacker and HQ resets to full HP under its new owner (capture). Grants population capacity rather than consuming it: +2 capacity per level, via nonProductionUpgrade.baseStats/statGrowth.populationCapacity below (level N grants 2*N). minPopulationPerLevel is a multiplier, not a flat number: requiredPopulationUsed to reach level N = 3 * (N - 1).
